title: Turkish Eggplant Imam Bayildi
description: A classic Turkish eggplant dish that's rich and flavorful, made with eggplant, onions, garlic, and herbs.

ingredients.name: Eggplant, sliced
ingredients.notes: Salt the eggplant slices to draw out excess moisture

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the sliced eggplant and cook until it starts to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the tomato paste and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Cover the skillet and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the eggplant is tender.
Stir in chopped parsley and serve hot.
